headline: Retroactive Tax Claim Filing (up to 3 years) Preparation Checklist — Los Angeles
articleBody:
Retroactive Tax Claim Filing (up to 3 years) Preparation Checklist for Los Angeles Clients

Before your Retroactive Tax Claim Filing (up to 3 years) appointment with Reclaim Tax Credit Specialists, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Payroll records
2. Tip reports
3. Tax returns
4. Employee w-2s
5. Credit card statements

Contact Reclaim Tax Credit Specialists at (213) 537-5613 to get started.
